Release notes#

Issues, feature requests, and contributions#

We welcome feedback and contributions from the community.

  • To report bugs or unexpected behaviour, please use the issue tracker.

  • To suggest new features or improvements, open an issue with a clear description of the proposed functionality.

  • Contributions are encouraged—feel free to open a pull request or start a discussion on GitHub.

Tip

Before opening a new issue, please check existing issues to avoid duplicates.

Release history#

This is the list of changes to SpaceNet between each version:

Test Summary#

Our test suite is designed to ensure the reliability and correctness of SpaceNet. Our test suite is regularly reviewed and updated to cover new features and edge cases. Below is a summary of the test results from our latest test run.

SpaceNet Test Suite Report#
============================= test session starts ==============================
collecting ... collected 34 items

tests/test_centrality.py::test_node_reach PASSED                         [  2%]
tests/test_centrality.py::test_laplacian PASSED                          [  5%]
tests/test_centrality.py::test_degree_centrality PASSED                  [  8%]
tests/test_centrality.py::test_closeness PASSED                          [ 11%]
tests/test_core_functions.py::test_generate_spatial_network PASSED       [ 14%]
tests/test_core_functions.py::test_add_node_labels PASSED                [ 17%]
tests/test_core_functions.py::test_delete_node_labels PASSED             [ 20%]
tests/test_core_functions.py::test_query_nodes PASSED                    [ 23%]
tests/test_core_functions.py::test_distance PASSED                       [ 26%]
tests/test_core_functions.py::test_distance_cached PASSED                [ 29%]
tests/test_core_functions.py::test_clear_distance_cached PASSED          [ 32%]
tests/test_core_functions.py::test_node_to_dataframe PASSED              [ 35%]
tests/test_core_functions.py::test_subnetwork PASSED                     [ 38%]
tests/test_core_functions.py::test_shortest_path_cached PASSED           [ 41%]
tests/test_global.py::test_spatial_network_volume PASSED                 [ 44%]
tests/test_global.py::test_alpha_index PASSED                            [ 47%]
tests/test_global.py::test_beta_index PASSED                             [ 50%]
tests/test_global.py::test_gamma_index PASSED                            [ 52%]
tests/test_global.py::test_cyclomatic_number PASSED                      [ 55%]
tests/test_global.py::test_diameter PASSED                               [ 58%]
tests/test_global.py::test_mean_clustering PASSED                        [ 61%]
tests/test_global.py::test_mean_detour_index PASSED                      [ 64%]
tests/test_node_metrics.py::test_degree PASSED                           [ 67%]
tests/test_node_metrics.py::test_clustering_coefficient PASSED           [ 70%]
tests/test_node_metrics.py::test_eccentricity PASSED                     [ 73%]
tests/test_partition.py::test_modularity_leiden PASSED                   [ 76%]
tests/test_partition.py::test_modularity_louvain PASSED                  [ 79%]

tests/test_point_patterns.py::test_integrated_poly_finite_kernel PASSED  [ 88%]
tests/test_point_patterns.py::test_pair_correlation_function PASSED      [ 91%]

tests/test_point_patterns.py::test_weighted_pair_correlation_function PASSED [ 97%]
tests/test_point_patterns.py::test_cross_weighted_pair_correlation_function PASSED [100%]
